description: Seed queries used by the salient-sentence extractor to score per-chunk sentences for docs-corpus salience (concept definitions, usage instructions, design rationale).
seeds: What does this section define or explain?
How is this feature or component used in practice, step-by-step?
What design choice or trade-off is being justified, and why?
What are the configuration options, defaults, and their effects?
What pitfalls, gotchas, or common mistakes does this section warn about?
